verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I will lift up mine eyes to the hills From whence cometh my help. My help cometh from the Lord, The Lord which made heaven and earth. He said He will not suffer thy foot, Thy foot to be moved; The Lord which keepeth thee, He will not slumber nor sleep.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For the Lord is thy keeper, The Lord is thy shade upon thy right hand, Upon thy right hand. Nor the sun shall not smite thee by day, Nor the moon by night. He shall preserve thy soul Even forevermore.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My help, my help, my help, All of my help cometh from the Lord.
